## Summary

- What is changed:
- Why this change is needed:
- Config / docs impact:

## Checks

- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] Formatting checked (`gofmt`)
- [ ] No credentials or auth files read/written
- [ ] New external facts (if any) added in `docs/99_sources.md`
- [ ] Docs/CHANGELOG updated
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated, or apply label `no-changelog-required`

## Security review

- [ ] No credential storage or refresh flow introduced
- [ ] No PII or high-cardinality labels added
- [ ] Provider policy updates present under `docs/provider-policy/`
